overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a character walking through a rain-soaked futuristic city at night. The scene features heavy rain, neon-lit buildings, digital billboards, wet reflective surfaces, and scattered pedestrians with a dark, atmospheric mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower urban plaza with steam vents and wet concrete surfaces

events.description: character transitions from crouching/aiming position to standing and begins walking forward
descends from elevated platform into lower misty plaza area
approaches group of pedestrians with distinctive glowing red neon umbrella

agents.ego_description: character starts in a crouched aiming position, then stands and walks forward through the rain-soaked lower plaza toward pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking together with a glowing red neon umbrella

entered.detail: circular steam vent emitting white mist on the wet ground
tall buildings with green and red neon signage visible through the rain
distinctive geometric umbrella with bright red neon illumination
concrete wall with metal railings along the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character crouching in a rainy urban plaza, then standing and walking forward through mist and steam. The character approaches a group of pedestrians carrying a distinctive glowing red neon umbrella, with neon-lit buildings visible in the background through the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway along plaza edge with illuminated AVANTE signage

events.description: begins ascending illuminated stairs toward upper plaza level
reaches upper level near the AVANTE sign and exits the lower plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking along the plaza wall and ascending stairs toward the AVANTE sign while passing other pedestrians in the rain

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'AVANTE' on the upper plaza level
concrete stairs with embedded lighting strips along the edges
metal safety railing along the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a retaining wall and ascends illuminated stairs toward the upper plaza level. The AVANTE sign becomes prominent in the center view as the character leaves the lower plaza behind, with the red neon umbrella and steam vent disappearing from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with palm trees and scattered neon storefronts

events.description: enters open palm tree plaza from covered walkway, revealing wider cityscape
passes under brighter blue and red neon signage changing local illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza surrounded by palm trees and neon-lit buildings, navigating around scattered pedestrians

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the plaza walkway, silhouetted against neon lights
curved modern building with extensive glass facade and blue lighting
commercial entrance with bright cyan neon trim and signage

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide-open plaza filled with palm trees and wet reflective surfaces. The space opens up to reveal more of the futuristic cityscape, with rounded glass buildings and blue neon storefronts becoming visible as the AVANTE sign and stairs recede behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial plaza with large digital billboards and corporate glass towers

events.description: approaches massive corporate building with prominent red vertical digital billboard
slows to look up at the tall building facade and surrounding architecture

agents.ego_description: approaching a large corporate building with massive digital displays, looking up at the architecture while walking through the reflective wet plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking through the plaza in the distance

entered.detail: tall multi-story glass and steel building with illuminated windows and signage
massive vertical digital display showing red and white graphics on building facade
modern building front with multiple digital screens and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the main commercial plaza toward an imposing corporate glass tower featuring a massive red digital billboard. The palm trees recede into the left background as the character approaches the building, occasionally looking up at the towering architecture and bright signage reflecting off the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, steam-filled urban alleyway into a vast, neon-lit corporate plaza. It begins with the character crouching in a rainy plaza before standing to walk through mist and steam toward pedestrians carrying a glowing red neon umbrella. As the character moves forward, the view shifts toward a retaining wall and ascends illuminated stairs, leaving the steam and umbrellas behind as a prominent AVANTE sign centers the frame. The scene then opens into a wide plaza filled with palm trees and blue neon storefronts, where the wet reflective surfaces expand to reveal rounded glass architecture. Finally, the camera advances through the commercial hub toward an imposing corporate glass tower, looking up at a massive red digital billboard that reflects off the rain-soaked pavement.
